memoryArtifacts.headline: Blanche de Navarre (1226-1283)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Blanche de Navarre, née en 1226, morte en 1283, fille de Thibaut Ier de Navarre, comte de Champagne et roi de Navarre, et d'Agnès de Beaujeu, fut duchesse consort de Bretagne.

En 1236, elle épouse Je …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany於1226年出生在西班牙時，她的父親Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre25歲，母親Agnès de Beaujeu21歲。她於1236年1月16日與Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux"結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1283年8月12日在艾歐洛布列塔尼享年57歲，埋葬在艾歐洛布列塔尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany于1226年出生在西班牙时，她的父亲Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre25岁，母亲Agnès de Beaujeu21岁。她于1236年1月16日与Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux"结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1283年8月12日在艾歐洛布列塔尼享年57岁，埋葬在艾歐洛布列塔尼。

nameMeanings.name: Navarra,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Edgardo, Guido, Santo, Vito, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonio, Benedicto, Camillo, Dante, Emilio, Fausto, Gaetano, Giuseppe, Mario, Romulo, Sergio.  Spanish Agustin, Herlinda, Manuel, Solita.

Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from Navarre (Castilian Navarra, Basque Nafarroa, French Navarre), a largely Basque-speaking region now divided between Spain and France, but in the Middle Ages an independent Basque kingdom. The name of the region derives from Basque naba ‘plain next to mountains’. Compare Navarre .

variants.name: Navarrete
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Pedro, Raul, Luis, Miguel, Roberto, Salvador, Francisco.

Spanish: habitational name from any of the places in La Rioja, Aragon, and the Basque Country named in Castilian Navarrete and in Basque Nafarrate (the latter in Araba/Álava province), of Basque origin (compare   Navarra   and   Nafarrate  ).
Basque: Castilianized form of Nafarrate or Nafarrete, cognates of 1.

variants.name: Navarro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Ramon, Francisco, Miguel, Rafael, Jorge, Pedro.
Spanish, Italian, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name for someone from Navarre (see   Navarra  ).

variants.name: Nava
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Carlos, Luis, Pedro, Manuel, Alfredo, Francisco, Ruben, Javier, Enrique.

Spanish, Catalan, and Asturian-Leonese: habitational name from any of numerous places called Nava, named with nava ‘treeless plateau’, a word of pre-Roman origin, most probably from Basque naba ‘plain next to mountains’ (see Navarra ).

variants.name: Navarre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Jacques, Anatole, Angelle, Camille, Marcelle.
French: habitational name from Navarre (see   Navarra  ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blanca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany was born in 1226, in Spain, her father, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, was 25 and her mother, Agnès de Beaujeu, was 21. She married Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux" on 16 January 1236. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 August 1283, in Bretagne, Europe, at the age of 57, and was buried in Bretagne, Europe.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany est née en 1226, à Espagne, son père, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Beaujeu, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux" le 16 janvier 1236. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 août 1283, à Bretagne, Europe, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Bretagne, Europe.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany 1226 in Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre 25 und ihre Mutter Agnès de Beaujeu 21. Sie hat am 16. Januar 1236 Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux" geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. August 1283 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Bretagne, Europa und wurde in Bretagne, Europa begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany è nata il nel 1226 nel Spagna, sua padre, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Agnès de Beaujeu, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux" il 16 gennaio 1236. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 agosto 1283, nel Bretagne, Europa, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Bretagne, Europa.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittanyが1226年にスペインで生まれた時，父Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarreは25歳，母Agnès de Beaujeuは21歳であった。1236年1月16日にJean de Bretagne I "le Roux"と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1283年8月12日にヨーロッパブレタグンで57歳で死去し，ヨーロッパブレタグンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany(이)가 1226년 스페인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de Beaujeu(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1236년 1월 16일 Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux"(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1283년 8월 12일 우럽 브레타그니에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 우럽 브레타그니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany nasceu em 1226, em Espanha, seu pai, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Beaujeu, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux" em 16 de janeiro de 1236. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1283, em Bretagne, Europa, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Bretagne, Europa.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany родилась в 1226 г. в местности Испания, её отцу по имени Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Beaujeu, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux" 16 января 1236 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 августа 1283 г. в местности бретагн, Европа в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности бретагн, Европа.

sm.1236–1283: mai le 1236 e o'o I le 1283

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanca Navarra, de Duchess of Brittany nació en 1226, en España, su papá, Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnès de Beaujeu, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jean de Bretagne I "le Roux" el 16 de enero de 1236. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1283, en Bretagne, Europa, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Bretagne, Europa.
